title: bothriospermum chinense
intro: Bothriospermum chinense is a type of flowering plant, also known as Chinese Buttonbush, which belongs to the family Boraginaceae. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which help to reduce swelling and prevent infections. The health benefits of Bothriospermum chinense include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, Bothriospermum chinense is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also dried and used as a powder in traditional Chinese medicine.
